```python
def compute_gradient(x, h=1e-7):
    x = np.array(x, dtype=float)
    g = np.zeros(10)
    fx = forward(x)
    for i in range(10):
        xp = x.copy()
        xp[i] += h
        g[i] = (forward(xp) - fx) / h
    return g
```
